reviews.comment:
Si venís algo cansado, hay un parque arbolado atrás de la estación, es para gente del aca pero está abierto...

(Translated by Google)
If you're feeling a bit tired, there's a wooded park behind the station; it's mostly for locals, but it's open to everyone...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXa1BLZmt3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Sinceramente la atención malísima!!! El playero estuvo tres horas charlando sin importar la cola de gente que lo estaba esperando para atender... Lentisimos!!! Mucha charla poco trabajo y la gente agolpada esperando... De te rror!!!

(Translated by Google)
Honestly, the service was terrible!!! The attendant spent three hours chatting away, ignoring the long line of people waiting to be served... So slow!!! Lots of talking, little work, and people were crammed together waiting... Awful!!!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtMzQzMTJBRRAB
